display.purpose: Brand wordmark and hero headings only. Never used in-app.

label.purpose: All UI labels — the system's primary informational cadence.

mono.purpose: All numeric data — amounts, percentages, NEY, IL, timestamps.

shadows: No shadows. The system uses tonal layering exclusively.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The single call-to-action per viewport. Cherry is the rarest color in the system.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #c9184a; color: #F7E7B4; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 12px 24px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #a3002d; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F7E7B4; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #1a2744; color: #6b7280; cursor: not-allowed; opacity: 0.5; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #9CA3B0; font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 0.625rem; letter-spacing: 0.2em; text-transform: uppercase; padding: 8px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { color: #F7E7B4; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #F7E7B4; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Default Card
components.description: Standard container for lists, pools, positions.
components.html:
Pool Name

NEY: 2.3%
components.css: .ds-card-default { background: #1a2744; border-radius: 12px; padding: 24px; border: 1px solid rgba(247, 231, 180, 0.1); }

components.name: Text Input
components.css: .ds-input { background: #1a2744; color: #F7E7B4; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 16px; border: 1px solid rgba(247, 231, 180, 0.1); border-radius: 8px; outline: none; width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; transition: border-color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: rgba(247, 231, 180, 0.3); } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #6b7280; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.5; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Health Dot
components.html: +2.3%
components.css: .ds-health-dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; display: inline-block; } .ds-health-green { background: #2ecc71; } .ds-health-yellow { background: #f39c12; } .ds-health-red { background: #e74c3c; } .ds-health-red-critical { background: #e74c3c; outline: 2px solid rgba(231, 76, 60, 0.5); animation: ds-pulse 1.5s ease-in-out infinite; } @keyframes ds-pulse { 0%, 100% { outline-width: 2px; } 50% { outline-width: 4px; } }

components.name: Top Navigation
components.description: Sticky top bar with route links.
components.html: POOLSDASHBOARDALERTS
components.css: .ds-nav { background: #003153; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 24px; padding: 0 24px; height: 64px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(247, 231, 180, 0.1); } .ds-nav-link { font-family: 'Inter', system-ui, sans-serif; font-weight: 500; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #6b7280; text-decoration: none; transition: color 0.2s ease-out; } .ds-nav-link:hover { color: #F7E7B4; } .ds-nav-active { color: #F7E7B4; font-weight: 700; }

narrative.overview: The RAW$ interface is the control panel of a bank vault at twilight — deep Prussian blue walls, warm butter cream light, and the quiet hum of monitored assets. Every pixel communicates financial gravity and terminal-like precision. This is not a playful DeFi dashboard; this is where yield is managed with the seriousness of a treasury desk. The system explicitly rejects the typical DeFi visual vocabulary: no purple-to-blue gradients, no floating geometric decoration, no card-nested-in-card layouts, no bounce easing, no cartoonish elements. The palette is anchored on two poles: Prussian blue (#003153) as the ambient environment and butter cream yellow (#F7E7B4) as the illuminated content.
keyCharacteristics: Dark by default, but not black — uses deep naval blues (noir, noir2, mid) to create layered depth without shadows
Monospace numbers throughout — every monetary value, percentage, and health metric renders in JetBrains Mono
Labels are universally tiny (10px), bold, uppercase, and widely tracked — a deliberate terminal-control-panel cadence
Tonal layering replaces shadows — depth comes from color steps, never from box-shadow
Calm at rest, loud at alert — the default state is quiet and readable; RED_CRITICAL states are stark and unambiguous

rules.name: The Rarity Rule
rules.body: Cherry appears on ≤5% of any screen. Its job is to direct attention to exactly one action or warning. If two cherry elements compete on the same viewport, one of them is wrong.

rules.name: The Two-Pole Rule
rules.body: Prussian blue and butter cream yellow are the fixed poles of the system. All other colors are visitors. No new color enters the palette without being able to justify itself against both poles.

rules.name: The No-Shadow Rule
rules.body: No surface in the system casts a shadow. Depth is purely a function of color temperature and opacity. box-shadow is prohibited.

dos: Do use Prussian blue (#003153) as the body background for every page.
Do use Butter Cream (#F7E7B4) for all primary text and numeric values.
Do render all numbers in JetBrains Mono — every amount, percentage, NEY, IL, and timestamp.
Do use the 10px uppercase tracked label vocabulary for all UI labels consistently.
Do layer surfaces by color value to convey depth without shadows.
Do keep cherry elements to ≤5% of any viewport.
Do include a HealthDot with every NEY score.
donts: Don't use shadows, blur, or glass effects anywhere.
Don't use purple, indigo, cyan, or teal — these are the generic DeFi defaults.
Don't render body text in gray on a colored background.
Don't use bounce or elastic easing.
Don't add decorative backgrounds, geometric patterns, or floating shapes.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with gradient).
Don't use side-stripe borders (colored border-left/border-right greater than 1px).
Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) as decorative scaffolding.
Don't animate layout properties — only opacity and transform.
